Half a hour later you and your little brother wave goodby as your mom drives away with your dad navigating. "So bud what should we do first?" you asked him.

11332.content:
Your little sister stands in the doorway looking up at you with a pouty look.

"What are YOU doing here?" She says, standoffishly. Of course, she always seemed to resent having you as an older brother. "I don't NEED a babysitter!"

You give her a dismissive little wave and reply, "well mom and dad think you do, brat, so I guess that makes you the little baby." She's blocking the doorway, so you plant a hand on her forehead and give her a little shove, but she folds her arms and holds her ground until you awkwardly pull your hand back. You could give her a harder shove, but that would upset your parents.

She huffs. "If I'm the baby how wimpy does that make you?"

"Come on, squirt," you start, and you can practically see the steam coming out her ears at that term. "Lets just try and get along. I'll let you play with your toys and watch me play videogames, alright?"

She stares at you for another couple seconds, then finally steps aside. "Whatever."

Moments later the tension is diffused by your parents rushing out the door. They give you a quick hello and goodbye and then they're gone, perfectly happy to leave as quickly as possible, so you shrug and bring your things inside. Your sister runs off while you set up a game console at the TV and sit back on the couch to start your week of getting paid to play videogames.
11332.title: sister

113321.title: Your sister comes back with a toy

choices: She pushes you forward and gives you an atomic wedgie
She writes something else on you
1133211.content:
Things are quiet for a few minutes, and you start to think this week might go by pretty uneventfully if little Dorothy (you've always alternated between calling her Dolly and Dodo, which both made her furious in the past, but you haven't seen much of her recently) decides to just keep to herself outside of mealtimes. You play some games and after a few minutes something hits the couch beside you. It's her! She's got something in her hands.

"Hey, Dodo, what you got there?"

"It's my magic marker," she says. She sounds a bit less annoyed now, which is a relief. Dealing with a brat all week isn't what you were looking forward to.

You make an impressed noise. "What's magic about it? Are you gonna draw something for me? I can find you some paper if you want..."

"It doesn't need paper. Ugh! I'll show you!" She grumbles and grabs your hand by the wrist, yanking it away from your controller. You start to wrestle with her grip, but she's pretty strong, and while you pull her toward yourself, she keeps a tight grip on you long enough to uncap her marker and write four letters down your arm. W-I-M-P.

"Dodo! Don't be a brat!" Angry now, you give a hard twist to throw her off altogether... but something is different. Your arm doesn't move. You're not even wrestling anymore. Suddenly her grip feels like iron and you can't budge. She smirks up at you.

"What's wrong, bro? Can't pull away? I knew you were weak, but this is pretty embarrassing."

How'd she get so strong all of a sudden!?
1133211.title: A Magic Marker

11332112.content:
Giggling like mad now, she twists your arm and you squeal in pain, unable to resist her until she's got you pinned to the end of the couch with your arm behind your back, held down by just one of her hands.

"L-let go right now, Dolly!" You growl, trying to sound intimidating, but there's a quaver in your voice that betrays your sudden fear as you find yourself squirming in the grip of a girl not even half your size.

"Nuh uh! My big bro is a big nerdy wimp, and nerds have to be punished!" She cackles as she starts writing on your arm again.

What does she write?

113321121.content:
You feel the marker writing on your skin while you wiggle uselessly against her, unable to even lift her weight. You can't see what she's writing on you, but you feel like something is sucked out of you. All sense of authority you had in this situation is gone. You're about to shout at her again, but you don't even know why she would listen to you. Even the idea of giving someone a resolute suggestion suddenly seems intimidating, and somehow you know that other people can just sense your lack of authority.

"L-lemme up! You have to! Mom said- yeeek!" You squeal even harder as she gives your arm another twist. You can only think of relying on your mom's authority and she doesn't seem to care. "Ah- I'm serious! I'm... gonna get real mad in a second!"

She cackles. "Ooh, big talk for a nerd! Are you gonna play videogames at me? Maybe I should dunk your head down a toilet!" She tugs up your shirt, sitting on your back to keep you pinned, and starts writing again.

Needs permission to leave
Afraid of fighting

"Alright tough guy! Lets see how tough you are!" She lets go finally and shoves you to the ground. "We both know mom wanted me to be in charge anyway!" She hops off the couch and puts up her little fists. "Come on, nerd!"

You cower away from her, scrambling back on the floor. She might punch you! You're so scared you just want to run away, but you can't just leave or... you don't know why! Did her marker make you a wimp? Were you already a wimp? You shouldn't be weaker than a little girl, but she looks so strong with her fists balled up, glaring at you.

"Listen, nerd! If you don't throw a punch, I'm gonna be REALLY mad!" She snaps, stomping right up to you. Are you trembling? You are! You raise one hand and throw a limp little punch that she just bats away, cackling in her caustic little tone. "Are you serious!?" She grabs your wrist and tugs you forward into a headlock whereupon she starts drilling her knuckle into your skull. "You're an even bigger wimp than I thought, nerd!"

You flail your arms and try to push her away, but she keeps your head tightly locked in her armpit while giving you the worst noogie of your life. She barely seems to notice your struggling, laughing while she torments you. All you can do is whimper pitifully. You can't believe you're being bullied by a little girl! You're on the verge of tears just from embarrassment! "C-come on! Stoppit! Mom said-"

"Pffft! Mom said! Mom said! No wonder you're a wimp, mommy's boy! Cry for your mommy! Say 'mommy help me! I'm too wimpy to protect myself!' and maybe I'll let you phone mom."

"Yes and you two have a week! Bye" Mom says back to you and your little sister. Your sister end the call. You don't like this at all.

"Now dear big brother we know I am in charge so what shall we do next?" She ask but you are quite sure you do not have any way to refuse what she want to do and she don not really want you to answer her question.

Your little sister took the magic marker from her pocket and and ask "What to do? What to do? Maybe I should write something or maybe I want to play with my big brother?"

Please choose writing. Please choose writing you wish because you think that marker don't work but if she write something she might leave you alone.

"Now I know. I will _________!" Your short but strong little sister says.
11332112111.title: "I remember I put Dorothy in charge!"

choices: Something else happens OR she write something else
113321121111.content:
"Now I know. I will write something! It will be totally super hyper thing" Your short but strong little sister says.

Oh yes, oh yeas she will write! You are in joy and smiles. Soon she will forget you and you can escape and be free. You start to move but your body won't move even an inch. What why my legs or body move? You ask from yourself. Somehow you feel like you need a permission to leave but your little sister have your smart-phone and you cannot ask the permission from your mom at the moment.

"Dorothy please. I need use my phone once more" You beg from your little sister. Wait why you beg to your smart-phone? You feel a little bit uneasy when your little sister look up to your eyes and say

"Why you need to use it once more? I was just middle of to write something with this magic marker" Ask your sister from you like an adult who is is the middle of something important and you feel like annoying child who have cut off his parent favourite fun entertainment.

"Little sister You can write what anything small child like you want but I need to use the smart-phone right now. Give it to me" You try to sound more like an adult but it does not have any effect to your little sister. Your sisters giggles l sweet and innocent laugh and asks.

"You want it back and you try to order me? Did ya forgot that I am in charge here and mom said it too" You felt your cheeks turn red because of blush and it is mixture of embarrassed and a little bit of rage. She does not takes this seriously at all.

"No Dorothy I did not but I don't want play small child games with you." You proclaim but you didn't said it too loud. You look down at your sister and her eyes then you felt like you have crossed some important line which you should not have crossed. Your little sister have very cold stare and give really devilish to you.

"Again you called me small and my doings small child play." She said and you could felt like cold sweat star to form on your back. You still are and an adult and she is just little child.

"Yeah because you are small. You just started your elementary school and you are just 4 ft (121.8 cm) tall. I am an adult and and my height is 5 ft 11 inches (1,80 meters)." You list the things to your sister and smile like you are winning here. You look at your sister's face and eyes she looks like she will erupt with anger and you feel like chill going down your spine.

Oh no do not beat. Do not beat me up. Me you wish in your mind. Why you are so scared of her she have more power than you but she is just a small,short and young child.

"I was going to write something else but you big brother do not leave any more choices" Says and sighs your little sister. Why this scares you? It is not like that magic marker works. You have seen her write something few times but she just repeat some natural and crystal clear things for example you being weak wimp and she is bossy like always. So nothing to worry right?

"I will write ________because you said I am young and small" She says and you are confused what like that will be reality any time soon. Yeah right. Sure believe little sister something silly like unicorns and magic.
113321121111.title: Write something!

1133211211111.content:
"I will write A-G-E C-H-A-N-G-E because you said I am young and small" She says and you are confused what like that will be reality any time soon. Yeah right. Sure believe little sister something silly like unicorns and magic.

But will she write that on you or on herself?
1133211211111.title: A-G-E   C-H-A-N-G-E

1133211211112.content:
"I will write S-I-Z-E C-H-A-N-G-E because you said I am young and small" She says and you are confused what like that will be reality any time soon. Yeah right. Sure believe little sister something silly like unicorns and magic.

But will she write that on you or on herself?
1133211211112.title: S-I-Z-E   C-H-A-N-G-E

choices: My name is.....or she writes something else on your arm.
113321122.content:
Hello Sizewatcher here. I think we should have here more option to choose. Something else than writing on your arm gain and My Name is.... That is why I just copy and paste most from last chapter,,,


"Nuh uh! My big bro is a big nerdy wimp, and nerds have to be punished!" She cackles as she starts writing on your arm again.

What does she write?
113321122.title: "My Name Is..."

1133211221.content:
You don't know what your sister is up to how writing something on her hand can changes something


Dorothy write six letters down on her arm and feel the magic marker's wet point touch her skin. Strangely there is no ink or visible text but she looks like she knows what she writes. "B-I-G-G-E-R"

By the way at the moment Dorothy is 4 ft (121.8 cm) at first year of elementary school.
You are 5ft 11 inches (1,80meters)


OR
Dorothy write five letters down on her arm and feel the magic marker's wet point touch her skin. Strangely there is no ink or visible text but she looks like she knows what she writes. "F-L-A-S-H"


OR

She writes something else
1133211221.title: She writes her on arm...?!

choices: The toy is stuffed animal/other character
An action figure or a doll
1133212.content:
VICTORY! Title comes on screen. Oh yeah you are still so good at this game.

You lower a game controller lower and thin for a moment. This will be so easy and relaxing week.

It's nice deal you don't have to almost anything just eat, sleep, play console games and check your sister don't do anything bad or wrong. You might even order her to to laundry, clean or some other thing for you. It is a good to be an adult and have your own obedient little servant....oops you mean helpful little sister.

Okay new round! You think. You rise the game controller back up good position and press buttons.

While you play your sister sister comes back with a toy but what kind of toy it is?
1133212.title: Something else

11332123.content:
So it is some other toy or an item. What is is?

A dollhouse


A remote/device


Some other toy or item
11332123.title: Some other toy or item

choices: It looks realistic maybe too realistic
113321231.content:
"Big bro! Let's play with this dollhouse" Says and smiles your little sister with excitement. You glance her and the doll house for second and sigh.

"Nah I have important going in this game" And you continued your gaming. Your sister move the dollhouse in-front her carries it like box on her arm. She acts always like this when she suggest some play with her and her toys. So that is why you don't even bother look at her and jut play the game.

"But you said you will play with me." You hear little disappointment in her voice and you are quite sure she makes the puppy eyes right now but you keep watching TV and your game. She is wrong you think

"Not exactly. I said I'll let YOU play with YOUR toys and watch ME play video games." You correct her and same time QUEST CLEAR pops on television screen. You are sure your sister almost dropped the dollhouse as she become distraught a bit.

"That....that isn't fair!" She shouts.

"Fair or unfair depends on many things ya'know" You reply and start doing your second quest in video game.

"You are so mean. I tell mom and dad that you don't play with me!" She threatens you.

"And what about it? Like they will believe you? They think you are just a small child." You say and continued your game.

"But.... I.... I"Little sister stammers. She have lowered the doll house on floor.

QUEST FAIL pops on television screen. Darn it! How can you concentrate on gaming if she whines whole time? You said to yourself. You put the game controller on sofa and look your bratty little sister.

"You cannot do anything" You smiles triumphantly and stand up at your full height. She is so small and weak little sister.

The dollhouse is on floor and between you two.Then you notice your little sister's doll house looks
113321231.title: A dollhouse

info.brief_description: Story of mean children turning up on you in various humiliating scenarios.
info.description:
You're not the toughest of them all and that's a light way to put it.
It's like a little girl or a boy could push you around and today is the day when they realize that.
While the name implies being beat up, the story may contain all sorts of humiliating and embarrassing scenarios.
Pretty much everything is allowed, except...

NO:
scat, hardcore gore, death, vomit nor actual sex.

Also, try to make everything fit the theme.
info.pretty_title: Beat up by a small kid
